actions.intent: Open with a tempting safe-side clear instead of the lower water-facing rescue.
Continue broad right-side clearing and delay the endangered lower puppy.
Spend another action on general board value rather than rescue order.
Keep building dock residue while the lower route remains unfinished.
Take a refreshed top clear and accept more dock pressure.
Push the dock higher instead of cashing the planned pivot triple.
Continue broad clearing after water has advanced.
Touch the middle route too late and overflow before the capstone rescue order is recovered.

notes: Verified fail target: tempting broad clears delay the endangered puppy and overflow the dock after the first water rise.
